data.body:
PASS 1 review — T10 (Infrastructure / IaC) [overlay]: NOT APPLICABLE / PASS (assessment of the parent plan "Repo-snapshot isolation for code-reading gates").

This plan does not provision or configure infrastructure: no IaC (Terraform/CloudFormation/CDK/Pulumi/Ansible), no Kubernetes/Helm, no cloud resources, no IAM/policies, no remote state. The snapshot materialization is a local filesystem/concurrency primitive operating on the MCP server's existing working directory. Serverless lifecycle (AWS volume placement, EFS/NFS flock caveat) is explicitly OUT OF SCOPE and tracked separately on alto-fruit-punch. Disk free-space watermark + janitor reclamation + flock GC interlock are application-level mechanics, not provisioned infra. Per the T10 overlay activation condition and its ANTI-FP guidance ("not-applicable for non-infra tickets"), T10 returns not-applicable with no findings.
